summary: Iteration 50 testing completed for AchatsTab refactoring (Step B). Found and FIXED 3 critical bugs: (1) Wrong component signature - `const AchatsTab = (ctx)` should be `const AchatsTab = ({ ctx })`, (2) Missing imports for Label and Input components, (3) Missing `expenseAnalyses` prop in ctx. After fixes, AchatsTab renders correctly with ZERO regression.

issues: React hydration warnings about HTML structure (span inside tr/tbody/th/td) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Wrong component signature - receiving ctx as entire props object instead of destructured prop
bugs_found_and_fixed.error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'filter')

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Missing imports for Label and Input components used in admin expense editing section
bugs_found_and_fixed.error: Would cause ReferenceError when admin tries to edit expense amount
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added imports: `import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'; import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';`

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Missing `expenseAnalyses` prop in ctx object passed to AchatsTab
bugs_found_and_fixed.error: expenseAnalyses would be undefined, causing ExpenseAnalysisBadges to not render
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added `expenseAnalyses` to the ctx prop object

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings in AchatsTab table structure - consider wrapping conditional `<th>` and `<td>` elements properly to avoid span wrappers in table rows. This is cosmetic and doesn't affect functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified the AchatsTab refactoring (Step B). The refactoring extracted ~900 lines of Achats tab JSX from CaissePage.jsx into a new AchatsTab.jsx component. Three bugs were found and fixed: (1) component signature was wrong - needed `({ ctx })` instead of `(ctx)`, (2) missing Label and Input imports, (3) missing expenseAnalyses prop. All features now work correctly for both Admin and Manager roles: header, sub-tabs (En cours/Achats validés), categories legend, summary stats, summary card, full detail table with Ticket 80mm and Imprimer A4 buttons, admin revision card with Approuver/Nouvelle révision buttons, pending expenses card with admin controls, approved expenses with Semaine/PDF/Convertir en BC buttons, manager-specific Achats communs and Achats Fournisseurs buttons, À RÉVISER card for manager, Acheté button for manager on approved expenses. Regression test passed for all other tabs.

tests: Sub-tabs 'En cours' and 'Achats validés' with testids
Summary stats (Total, en attente, à réviser, approuvées, terminées)
'Voir tout en détail' button toggles full detail table
Full detail table with Ticket 80mm and Imprimer A4 buttons
Admin revision card 'MODIFIÉS — EN COURS DE RÉVISION CHEZ LA GÉRANTE'
Pending expenses card with admin controls (Approuver, Modifier & renvoyer, Refuser)
Approved expenses with Semaine, PDF, Convertir en BC buttons
'Achats Fournisseurs' button with shopping list count

data_testids_verified: admin-revision-approve-<id> - Admin approve button on revision_requested expenses
admin-revision-revise-<id> - Admin revise button on revision_requested expenses
revise-btn-<id> - 'Modifier & renvoyer' button on pending expenses
convert-po-<id> - 'Convertir en BC' button on approved expenses
expense-ratio-alert - Alert card when expense ratio > 40%
expense-ratio-ok - OK indicator when expense ratio <= 40%
